ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weapons" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon */,
  "physical_damage" INTEGER /* Physical damage the weapon deals */,
  "magical_damage" INTEGER /* Magical damage the weapon deals */,
  "fire_damage" INTEGER /* Fire damage the weapon deals */,
  "lightning_damage" INTEGER /* Lightning damage the weapon deals */,
  "holy_damage" INTEGER /* Holy damage the weapon deals */,
  "critical_boost" INTEGER /* Critical hit boost percentage */,
  "strength_requirement" TEXT /* Strength required to use the weapon */,
  "dexterity_requirement" TEXT /* Dexterity required to use the weapon */,
  "intelligence_requirement" TEXT /* Intelligence required to use the weapon */,
  "faith_requirement" TEXT /* Faith required to use the weapon */,
  "arcane_requirement" TEXT /* Arcane required to use the weapon */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the weapon */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill associated with the weapon */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the weapon */,
  "obtain_method" TEXT /* Method of obtaining the weapon */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Durability of the weapon */,
  "crafting_materials" TEXT /* List of materials required to craft the weapon */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the weapon's icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapons_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "damage_type" TEXT /* Type of damage dealt by the skill */,
  "cooldown" INTEGER /* Cooldown time of the skill in seconds */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Resource cost to use the skill (e.g., stamina, mana) */,
  "effect_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the skill's effect in seconds */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the skill in game units */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., Single, Area, Self) */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the skill's effect */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the skill's icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damage_types" (
  "damage_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damage type */,
  "damage_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the damage type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the damage type */,
  "resistance_multiplier" TEXT /* Multiplier for resistance to this damage type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("damage_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the attribute's icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_attributes" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value required for the attribute to use the weapon */,
  "attribute_multiplier" TEXT /* Multiplier for the attribute's effect on the weapon's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id", "attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the character */,
  "dexterity" INTEGER /* Dexterity of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence of the character */,
  "faith" INTEGER /* Faith of the character */,
  "arcane" INTEGER /* Arcane of the character */,
  "max_health" INTEGER /* Maximum health points of the character */,
  "current_health" INTEGER /* Current health points of the character */,
  "max_stamina" INTEGER /* Maximum stamina points of the character */,
  "current_stamina" INTEGER /* Current stamina points of the character */,
  "max_mana" INTEGER /* Maximum mana points of the character */,
  "current_mana" INTEGER /* Current mana points of the character */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the character's icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_equipment" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon equipped by the character */,
  "slot" TEXT /* Equipment slot (e.g., Main Hand, Off Hand, Head, Body) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_equipment_weapon_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_id") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category's icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_category_mapping" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the weapon belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES weapon_categories ("category_id")
)
